text:
Comment on attachment 198910
v0

(In reply to Johannes Lundberg from comment #13)
And I'm not the maintainer. The fate of freedreno or xatracker isn't up to me. I've provided v0 as a rough draft for the maintainer but didn't plan to actually land it. Looks like I've outstepped my bounds.
